description: A prospective tenant has submitted an application for a rental unit. The agent must perform a background and credit check.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the new rental application from the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the applicant and the property they applied for.

nodes.task_description: Run a credit check and criminal background check using the applicant's provided information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the checks through an integrated service.

nodes.task_description: Review the screening report against the property's qualifying criteria (e.g., credit score > 650, no evictions) and approve or deny the application.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes an accurate decision based on the report and criteria.
